vocab.meaning: một kỷ vật đáng trân trọng
vocab.example: The watch my grandfather gave me upon my graduation has become a cherished memento of our bond.

vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một cột mốc trưởng thành/bước ngoặt cuộc đời
vocab.example: In my culture, receiving a sophisticated timepiece often serves to mark a rite of passage into adulthood.

vocab.meaning: người tặng quà hào phóng/ân nhân
vocab.example: I was once surprised by a generous benefactor who gifted me a luxury watch after I completed my internship.

vocab.meaning: vật gia bảo truyền đời không lỗi thời
vocab.example: I view the vintage watch I received not just as a tool, but as a timeless heirloom to be preserved for the future.

vocab.meaning: một món quà bất ngờ (như từ trên trời rơi xuống)
vocab.example: Getting that high-end smartwatch was an unexpected windfall that significantly improved my productivity.
